title: Exact Least Squares Regression Checks

solver_reuse.target: least-squares bad coefficient and bad RSS-improvement QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Malformed regression rows where exact normal-equation replay forces 3*beta0 + 3*beta1 = 7 while one row claims beta0 = 1 and beta1 = 1, and exact RSS replay computes baseline_rss - model_rss = 9/2 while another row claims improvement 4.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional regression rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep Gauss-Markov optimality, inference, asymptotics, model selection, and floating-point procedures in Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed least-squares normal-equation checks as deterministic QF_LRA formulas.
Replay regression witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Keep the bad coefficient and bad RSS-improvement rows on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path.
Keep inference, asymptotics, model selection, and floating-point regression under Lean horizon or numerical-honesty metadata until formal routes exist.
